article.title: Uber SDE 2 Fullstack Interview Experience
article.content:
**How did I apply** : I had applied multiple times via referrals but never got shortlisted. Then, one fine day, the role showed up on LinkedIn. I applied directly and received an email from the recruiter to schedule the screening round.

**Screening round (Elimination round)**
I was asked one question from the Uber-tagged list from the last 3 months. I explained the brute-force approach first. The interviewer seemed satisfied and then asked for an optimized solution along with time and space complexity.

I gave the optimized solution but missed a few edge cases

After about 2 weeks, the recruiter reached out again to schedule my DSA and LLD rounds. The recruiter mentioned that if I cleared these rounds, the System Design and Hiring Manager (HM) rounds would be scheduled

**DSA round**

I was asked a variation of Course Schedule II

**LLD round**

I was asked to build the famous Connect Four game, which I had practiced earlier via GreatFrontend.

After this, I received an email regarding the scheduling of the System Design and HM rounds.

**System Design & HM round**

**System design** :  I was asked to design a backend system to fetch trending items

**HM round**:  I was asked basic behavioral questions such as conflicts with team members or PMs, projects I collaborated on, and projects I worked on end-to-end. I would strongly recommend preparing 4–5 stories using the STAR format.

Hope this helps someone who is currently giving interviews.
Fingers crossed now — waiting for the results!

**verdict : Rejected**

post.content: Interviews were virtual or you were called in office?\n\n
In the screening round, did they ask anything from resume related to System design and architecture?
after how many days of LLD round you\'ll get your system design round scheduled?
What reason they mentioned for rejection? Also which specific round led to rejection?
What was the feedback for individual rounds?\n
First of all the best for the results man. \nAlso, I wanted to know if it was it an in-person interview in their BLR office or was it scheduled online ?
